This property pertains to the catering feature within the Meeting Rooms module. It allows administrators to define the various statuses that can be assigned to catering orders on the catering dashboard. Recognizing that terminology may differ across organizations, this list is configurable to accommodate specific needs. The sequence of statuses specified here will directly reflect the order in which they appear on the catering dashboard.
